summary: Generated tests for new Immobilienangebot navigation dropdown and 4 region landing pages (Skadar-Lake, Žabljak, Budva, Nikšić). Verified bug fixes: 1) Serbia Executive comments now work with slug-based endpoint, 2) WYSIWYG editor backward text fix confirmed. All 57 frontend and 24 backend tests passing.

tests: Dropdown button visible with correct styling
Dropdown opens on hover showing all 4 regions
Dropdown highlights when on immobilien page
Immobilienangebot accordion visible in mobile menu
Navigation to region page from accordion
Menu closes when navigating to a page
Exposé form submits and shows success message
Page loads with correct structure (Ski-Resort der Zukunft)
Page loads with correct structure (Küstenmetropole der Adria)
Page loads with correct structure (Industriezentrum mit Zukunft)

serbia_executive_comments_bug_fix.description: Comment submission and loading now works correctly using articleId=999 and articleSlug='serbia-executive-access' with slug-based endpoint
tests: Comments section loads and displays existing comments

wysiwyg_editor_bug_fix.description: WYSIWYG editor no longer moves cursor to end on focus, preventing backward text issue on mobile. handleFocus() is now empty to let browser handle cursor naturally.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Immobilienangebot dropdown/accordion navigation with 4 region pages (Skadar-Lake, Žabljak, Budva, Nikšić). Bug fixes verified: 1) Serbia Executive comments work via slug-based endpoint (articleId=999, articleSlug='serbia-executive-access'), 2) WYSIWYG editor handleFocus() is now empty to prevent backward text on mobile. Article title for 'balkans-vs-eu-investing-reality-check' is currently 'Speichern' (was edited via admin panel). Executive Inquiry form on Serbia Executive page is MOCKED (by design).
